privileged_info_summary: The expected output paths are /home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_summary.xml, /home/ga/SUMO_Output/stress_summary.xml, and /home/ga/SUMO_Output/stress_test_report.txt. Executing the baseline simulation yields a baseline_max_halting of 591 and a baseline_min_speed of -1.0 (occurring in steps where running vehicles are stopped). Running the stress simulation with a 1.2x scale yields a stress_max_halting of 822 and a stress_min_speed of -1.0. The Bologna Pasubio scenario represents real-world traffic data.
